posts.raw_content:
WTF happened to this place? We seem to have fewer users than we did years ago, but I’d expect that to mean we’d have a harder core of Trump/MAGA supporters. Instead, every thread is filled with doomers and whiners. “Why isn’t every illegal deported yet?” “Why isn’t Obama in prison yet?” “Two more weeks!”

Draining the swamp is the biggest national challenge since the Civil War. It can’t happen instantly. It will take years. Trump, being a patriot with a big ego, wants a lasting solution. That means doing things carefully and legally, and making sure the majority of public goes along with it. 

I think it’s clear that Democrats are cooked and they know it. They are connected to all the big frauds: elections, Medicare, daycare, hospice, autism, immigration. It all leads to the very top: Obama, Hillary, and the entire Deep State and leftist edifice. Trump’s DOJ, aided by DOGE and AI, has undoubtedly mapped it out and is preparing cases. 

Trump is a showman who ran a hit reality TV show. He knows how to get public attention and build suspense. As Scott Adams said, he’s a master persuader. He knows how important the midterms are to his legacy, so *of course* he has a plan to win them. I think part of that will involve proving to the public that the Democratic Party is widely and deeply corrupt. He can do that by bringing iron-clad cases against various people like Keith Ellison and Ilhan Omar. He can do it in a way that the legacy media can’t ignore, cover up, or make excuses for. 

He has the motive, means, and opportunity to make himself into a national hero for the ages. Why wouldn’t he do that? But it won’t happen all at once! Federal cases take months and years to construct. He also doesn’t want to spill all the beans all at once. There’s almost too much corruption for the public to grasp, and he knows that the biggest scandals are never exposed all at once. They begin, the public gets interested, then more information comes out over time. That way a story develops and interest builds. It wouldn’t make sense to arrest Obama and Hillary too early. A better plan is to start indicting their underlings, get people to flip, and get the public asking: “Gee, this seems to go all the way to the top. When will they arrest Obama and Hillary?” Then the story goes from “Trump is misusing power to get revenge” to “Trump is bringing justice which the people want.” 

USAID is gone. PBS/NPR defunded. Wokeness and DEI are on the ropes. Trans madness has peaked. The border is secure and millions of illegals are already gone. Domestic energy production is up. The Pentagon is getting crucial reforms. Foreign enemies are defeated (Venezuela), or on the ropes (Cuba, Iran), or dealing with major setbacks (China). 

So would everyone try to cheer up? We are already winning on a vast scale, and there are more wins in the pipeline.
